description: Political news, geopolitics, military analysis, government policy

mgPreferences.when: numerical data, costs, casualties, budgets, percentages
contrasting sides, opposing forces, before/after, cost comparisons
geopolitical context, borders, regions, troop movements, territorial control
citing news sources, reports, official statements, leaked documents
opening hook, section transitions, key revelations
expert quotes, witness statements, political declarations
military spending, polling data, economic impact, force comparisons
top military powers, most affected regions, key players
chronological events, escalation sequence, historical context
key points summary, list of demands, peace conditions
budget allocation, force composition, vote distribution

stock.use: war scenes, military equipment, soldiers, tanks, explosions, city destruction

web-image.use: maps, satellite imagery, documents, official photos, infographics

youtube.use: press conferences, official statements, news broadcasts, parliament sessions

pacing.sceneDuration: 2-4 seconds per clip, faster during action sequences
pacing.transitionStyle: 80% hard cuts, 20% subtle zoom or dissolve
pacing.textAppearance: slide-in preferred, always with slight bounce

sceneStructure.footage: Shocking or emotional footage, close-up action
sceneStructure.notes: Open with a provocative question or dramatic statement
Set the geopolitical stage, show where events are happening

sceneStructure.footage: Stock military footage, official documents, data visualizations
sceneStructure.notes: Present hard numbers and comparisons, cite sources

sceneStructure.footage: Expert footage, news clips, supporting visuals
sceneStructure.notes: Expert opinions, deeper analysis, multiple perspectives
Subscribe prompt with final impactful statement
